seoTitle: Scarborough vs Schofields — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Scarborough and Schofields. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Scarborough and Schofields.
heading: Scarborough vs Schofields — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Scarborough, New South Wales and Schofields, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Scarborough has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Schofields (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Scarborough or Schofields safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Scarborough has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Schofields scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Scarborough scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Schofields scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Scarborough or Schofields?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Scarborough has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
